_comment: Configuration for CV and cover letter generation (Phase 7)
_description: Controls how Gemini tailors CVs and cover letters for each job

cv_generation._temperature_note: Lower = more consistent, Higher = more creative (0.0-1.0)
cv_generation._max_projects_note: Maximum number of projects to include in tailored CV
cv_generation._max_experience_bullets_note: Maximum bullet points per experience entry
cv_generation._include_skills_section_note: Whether to include a skills section (recommended)
cv_generation._ats_friendly_note: Optimize for ATS parsing (single column, standard fonts, no tables)

cover_letter_generation._temperature_note: Slightly higher for more personalized tone
cover_letter_generation._include_company_research_note: Use Phase 8 research in cover letter (if available)

latex_compilation._pdflatex_path_note: Path to pdflatex executable (default assumes it's in PATH)
latex_compilation._compile_timeout_note: Maximum seconds to wait for PDF compilation

dev_mode._skip_pdf_compilation_note: Set to true to skip PDF generation during testing
dev_mode._use_mock_data_note: Use mock Gemini responses for testing without API calls
